# VLM outputs pixel coordinates; executor owns GPS conversion

`REQ-pixel-coordinate-output`

| kind | status |
|---|---|
| requirement | draft |

The VLM shall emit integer pixel coordinates (x, y) on a 512x512 map image rather than GPS coordinates. The executor shall perform the pixel-to-GPS conversion. No component upstream of the executor shall perform or require GPS arithmetic.

**Rationale.** Small VLMs cannot reliably perform the floating-point coordinate arithmetic needed for GPS waypoint computation. Expressing targets as pixel offsets on the provided image keeps the VLM in image space where it is competent.


**Fit criterion.** `The goto_pixel command schema carries (x, y) ints 0-511; Executor.execute calls pixel_to_gps before issuing any MAVLink waypoint.`

**Verification method:** inspection · **priority:** shall · **verification status:** passing
